fields.label: Tenant
fields.description: Tenant this ERPNext integration configuration belongs to

fields.label: Tenant Name
fields.description: Auto-filled from Tenant

fields.label: Integration Enabled
fields.description: Enable or disable ERPNext integration for this tenant

fields.label: Debug Mode
fields.description: Enable debug mode for integration operations (logs to console)

fields.label: ERPNext Site URL
fields.description: URL of the ERPNext site to integrate with (leave empty if using same site)

fields.label: API Key
fields.description: API Key for external ERPNext site authentication (leave empty if using same site)

fields.label: API Secret
fields.description: API Secret for external ERPNext site authentication

fields.label: Connection Status
fields.description: Current connection status to ERPNext

fields.label: Sync Toggles
fields.description: Enable or disable synchronization for each entity type

fields.label: Sync Products to Items
fields.description: Synchronize Trade Hub SKU Products to ERPNext Items

fields.label: Sync Sellers to Suppliers
fields.description: Synchronize Trade Hub Seller Profiles to ERPNext Suppliers

fields.label: Sync Buyers to Customers
fields.description: Synchronize Trade Hub Buyer Profiles to ERPNext Customers

fields.label: Sync Orders to Sales Orders
fields.description: Synchronize Trade Hub Orders to ERPNext Sales Orders

fields.label: Sync RFQ to Supplier Quotation
fields.description: Synchronize Trade Hub RFQs to ERPNext Supplier Quotations

fields.label: Sync Inventory
fields.description: Synchronize stock levels between Trade Hub and ERPNext

fields.label: Auto Create Items
fields.description: Automatically create ERPNext Items when new products are created in Trade Hub

fields.label: Auto Update Items
fields.description: Automatically update ERPNext Items when products are updated in Trade Hub

fields.label: Item Group Mapping
fields.description: JSON mapping from Trade Hub categories to ERPNext Item Groups

fields.label: Default Item Group
fields.description: Default ERPNext Item Group for products without mapping

fields.label: Sync Product Images
fields.description: Include product images in synchronization

fields.label: Sync Product Variants
fields.description: Synchronize product variants as separate ERPNext Items

fields.label: Auto Create Sales Orders
fields.description: Automatically create ERPNext Sales Orders when Trade Hub orders are confirmed

fields.label: Auto Update Order Status
fields.description: Automatically sync order status changes between Trade Hub and ERPNext

fields.label: Auto Create Delivery Notes
fields.description: Automatically create Delivery Notes when orders are shipped

fields.label: Auto Create Sales Invoices
fields.description: Automatically create Sales Invoices from completed orders

fields.label: Sync Stock Levels
fields.description: Synchronize stock quantities from ERPNext to Trade Hub

fields.label: Sync Warehouse Data
fields.description: Include warehouse-specific stock data in synchronization

fields.label: Default Warehouse
fields.description: Default warehouse for inventory operations

fields.label: Sync Interval (minutes)
fields.description: Interval for inventory sync in minutes (minimum: 5)

fields.label: Enable Webhooks
fields.description: Enable ERPNext webhooks for real-time sync

fields.label: Webhook Secret
fields.description: Secret key for webhook signature verification

fields.label: Webhook Endpoint URL
fields.description: URL for ERPNext to send webhook notifications

fields.label: Webhook Events
fields.default: Item,Sales Order,Delivery Note,Sales Invoice,Stock Ledger Entry
fields.description: Comma-separated list of ERPNext DocTypes to receive webhooks for

fields.label: Enable Scheduled Sync
fields.description: Enable periodic background synchronization

fields.label: Sync Frequency
fields.options:
Every 15 Minutes
Every 30 Minutes
Hourly
Daily
Weekly
fields.description: How often to run scheduled synchronization

fields.label: Last Sync Time
fields.description: Timestamp of the last successful synchronization

fields.label: Next Scheduled Sync
fields.description: Timestamp of the next scheduled synchronization

fields.label: Custom Field Mappings
fields.description: JSON configuration for custom field mappings between Trade Hub and ERPNext (use UI component)

fields.label: Retry Failed Syncs
fields.description: Automatically retry failed synchronization attempts

fields.label: Max Retry Attempts
fields.description: Maximum number of retry attempts for failed syncs

fields.label: Notify on Sync Failure
fields.description: Send email notification when synchronization fails

fields.label: Notification Email
fields.description: Email address for sync failure notifications

fields.label: Last Connection Test
fields.description: Timestamp of the last connection test

fields.label: Total Synced Products
fields.description: Total number of products synchronized to ERPNext

fields.label: Total Synced Orders
fields.description: Total number of orders synchronized to ERPNext

fields.label: Sync Error Count
fields.description: Number of synchronization errors since last reset
